questoes.pergunta: Complete with the past simple: 'She _____ (go) to the cinema yesterday.'
Complete: 'I _____ (see) a beautiful bird this morning.'
Complete with the negative: 'They _____ (not/come) to the party.'
questoes.explicacao: Past simple negative: didn't + base verb.

questoes.pergunta: Complete with the question form: '_____ you _____ (see) John yesterday?'
questoes.explicacao: Past simple question: Did + subject + base verb.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct past continuous: 'I _____ (read) when you called.'
Complete: 'While they _____ (play), it started to rain.'
Choose the correct sentence:
opcoes: a) When I arrived, she left.
b) When I arrived, she was leaving.
c) When I arrived, she were leaving.
d) When I arrived, she leave.

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'He _____ (break) his leg last week.'
Complete: 'I _____ (not/sleep) well last night.'
Complete: '_____ you _____ (watch) TV when I called?'
questoes.explicacao: Question in past continuous: Were you watching?

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct past form of 'eat':
Complete: 'She _____ (write) a letter to her friend yesterday.'
Complete: 'We _____ (have) dinner when the phone rang.'
Choose the correct sentence:
opcoes: a) I didn't went to school yesterday.
b) I didn't go to school yesterday.
c) I not went to school yesterday.
d) I didn't gone to school yesterday.

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'They _____ (buy) a new car last month.'
Complete: 'What _____ (you/do) at 8 pm last night?'
questoes.explicacao: Specific time in the past: past continuous question.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct past of 'drive':
Complete: 'I _____ (meet) him at the party last week.'
Complete: 'She _____ (not/come) because she was tired.'
Complete: 'While I _____ (walk) home, I saw an accident.'
Choose the correct question: '_____ she _____ (enjoy) the movie?'
Complete: 'They _____ (live) in London for five years, then moved.'
Complete: 'When I _____ (arrive), they _____ (have) dinner.'
questoes.explicacao: Interrupted action: arrived (short) vs were having (ongoing).

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct past of 'fly':
Complete: 'I _____ (not/hear) the phone because I _____ (sleep).'
Complete: 'What _____ (you/do) last weekend?'
questoes.explicacao: Past simple question for completed actions.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct past of 'swim':
Complete: 'She _____ (fall) and _____ (hurt) her leg.'
questoes.explicacao: Fell (past of fall), hurt (past of hurt, same form).

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'While we _____ (travel), we met many interesting people.'
Choose the correct negative in past continuous: 'I _____ (not/sleep) when you called.'
Complete: 'They _____ (already/leave) when I arrived.'
questoes.explicacao: Past perfect for action before another past action.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct past perfect form: 'She _____ (finish) her homework before dinner.'
Complete: 'I _____ (never/see) such a beautiful sunset before.'
questoes.explicacao: Past perfect for experience before another past time.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct sentence:
opcoes: a) When we arrived, the movie started.
b) When we arrived, the movie had started.
c) When we arrived, the movie have started.
d) When we arrived, the movie was started.
questoes.explicacao: The movie started before we arrived → past perfect.

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'He _____ (not/eat) anything for two days.' (before he collapsed)
questoes.explicacao: Past perfect for duration before another event.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct past of 'bring':
Complete: 'They _____ (be) friends for many years before they had a fight.'
questoes.explicacao: Past perfect for duration before another past.

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'I _____ (already/eat) when she invited me.'
Choose the correct question in past perfect: '_____ they _____ (finish) before you left?'
questoes.explicacao: Past perfect question: Had + subject + past participle.

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'She was tired because she _____ (not/sleep) well.'
Choose the correct past of 'teach':
Complete: 'After she _____ (wash) the dishes, she watched TV.'
questoes.explicacao: Past perfect optional after 'after', but emphasizes completion.

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'I _____ (never/be) to Paris before my trip last year.'
Choose the correct sentence with 'used to':
opcoes: a) I used to play football when I was a child.
b) I use to play football.
c) I am used to play football.
d) I used to playing football.

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'He _____ (smoke) but he quit last year.'
questoes.explicacao: Used to for past habit no longer true.

questoes.pergunta: Choose the correct negative form of 'used to':
opcoes: a) I didn't used to like vegetables.
b) I didn't use to like vegetables.
c) I used not to like vegetables.
d) Both b and c are correct.
questoes.explicacao: Negative: didn't use to or used not to.

questoes.pergunta: Complete: 'When I was young, I _____ (be) very shy.'
Choose the correct option: 'I _____ (meet) her last year.'
Complete: 'They _____ (wait) for the bus when it started to rain.'
Complete: 'I _____ (already/see) that movie, so I didn't want to see it again.'
questoes.explicacao: Past perfect for earlier past action.
